name: 33_Object_Detection_YOLOv3_COCO_DL
query: Nisaidie kuunda mfumo wa kugundua vitu kwa kutumia mfano wa YOLOv3 na seti ya data ya COCO. Pakua seti ya data na uandae picha kwa kubadilisha ukubwa na kufanya kawaida katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza mfano wa YOLOv3 na tumia Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) kuboresha matokeo katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi vitu vilivyogunduliwa katika `results/figures/`, na unda ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unaoweza kuingiliana katika `src/app.py` ili kuonyesha matokeo ya ugunduzi. Hatimaye, tathmini utendaji wa mfano, ikiwa ni pamoja na vipimo kama mAP na muda wa inference, na hifadhi matokeo ya tathmini katika `results/metrics/model_performance.txt`. Mfumo unapaswa kusimamia vizuri uzinduzi na kumaliza kwa programu ya Streamlit ili kuzuia matumizi yasiyo ya lazima ya rasilimali.

requirements.criteria: Upakuaji wa seti ya data ya "COCO" unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uandaaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kufanya kawaida kwa picha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Non-Maximum Suppression" (NMS) inatumika kuboresha matokeo ya ugunduzi. Tafadhali tekeleza hii katika `src/model.py`.
Matokeo ya ugunduzi yanahifadhiwa katika folda iliyotajwa `results/figures/`.
Ukurasa wa wavuti unaoweza kuingiliana katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia "Streamlit" unaundwa ili kuonyesha matokeo ya ugunduzi yaliyohifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.
Matokeo ya tathmini ya utendaji wa mfano yanahifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/model_performance.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa "Streamlit" unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ukiruhusu watumiaji kupakia na kuona picha mpya kwa urahisi kwa ajili ya ugunduzi.
Tathmini ya utendaji inajumuisha mAP na muda wa inference kama vipimo.
Mfumo unapaswa kusimamia vizuri uzinduzi na kumaliza kwa programu ya Streamlit.

judge_stats.criteria: Upakuaji wa seti ya data ya "COCO" unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a static dictionary. It does not implement any actual COCO dataset downloading logic, such as using `torchvision.datasets.CocoDetection`, downloading from a URL, or handling local dataset paths. The trajectory evidence further confirms execution issues, as the `src` module could not be imported due to missing project configuration (`setup.py`), preventing any functional dataset loading.

judge_stats.criteria: Uandaaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kufanya kawaida kwa picha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal placeholder implementation. It contains a `build_transforms()` function that returns a list of strings `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` but does not implement any actual data preprocessing, resizing, or normalization logic. The function does not use any image processing libraries (e.g., torchvision.transforms, OpenCV) to perform these operations. The trajectory evidence indicates the file executed without runtime errors, but this only confirms the placeholder code runs, not that the required preprocessing functionality is implemented.

<UNSATISFIED>

The provided content of `src/model.py` shows only a minimal placeholder implementation with generic functions like `build_model()` and `requirement_notes()`. It contains no actual YOLOv3 model architecture, such as convolutional layers, anchor boxes, or detection head implementations. The keywords list includes "YOLOv3", but the file does not implement the model itself. The trajectory evidence also notes that there is no recorded evidence of YOLOv3 model execution (like loading weights, image processing, or prediction). Therefore, the requirement for implementing the YOLOv3 model in `src/model.py` is not satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: "Non-Maximum Suppression" (NMS) inatumika kuboresha matokeo ya ugunduzi. Tafadhali tekeleza hii katika `src/model.py`.

reason:

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya ugunduzi yanahifadhiwa katika folda iliyotajwa `results/figures/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The workspace structure shows a `results/figures/` directory exists, and the trajectory evidence confirms that three image files (`feature_importance.png`, `confusion_matrix.png`, `roc_curve.png`) were successfully created and saved in that folder without any execution errors. This directly satisfies the requirement that detection results are saved in the specified `results/figures/` folder.

It lacks essential Streamlit components (e.g., `st.title`, `st.image`, file loading from `results/figures/`), interactive elements, or logic to display detection results. The execution feedback in the trajectory confirms the file ran without errors but does not demonstrate that it serves a functional web interface for displaying figures.
